mapper.select: SELECT TA021 FROM MOCTA WHERE CONCAT(RTRIM(TA001), '-', RTRIM(TA002)) = #{jobNo}

SELECT PLANT_CODE plantCode, I.ITEM_CODE itemNo, IL.LOT_CODE lotCode, SUM(INVENTORY_QTY) qty, I.ITEM_NAME itemName, I.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseNo, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName, IP.UDF021 binCode, U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, U.UNIT_NAME unitName, CONVERT(varchar(8), GETDATE(), 112) date FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN A LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON A.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT IL ON IL.ITEM_LOT_ID = A.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT IP ON IP.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT P ON IP.Owner_Org_ROid = P.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON A.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON U.UNIT_ID = I.STOCK_UNIT_ID WHERE INVENTORY_QTY != 0
AND PLANT_CODE = #{plantCode}
AND I.ITEM_CODE like #{itemNo} + '%'
AND I.ITEM_NAME like #{itemName} + '%'
AND I.ITEM_SPECIFICATION like #{itemSpec} + '%'
GROUP BY PLANT_CODE,I.ITEM_CODE,IL.LOT_CODE,I.ITEM_NAME,I.ITEM_SPECIFICATION,W.WAREHOUSE_CODE,W.WAREHOUSE_NAME,IP.UDF021,U.UNIT_CODE,U.UNIT_NAME
SELECT bar_type FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{number}
